zh: 他點頭表示贊同。
en: He indicated approval with a nod.

zh: 我深信寫日記的價值。
en: I am convinced of the value of keeping a diary.

zh: 就交通安全而言，台北大部分駕駛員應該再受教育。
en: As far as traffic safety is concerned, most drivers in Taipei should be reeducated.

zh: 假如當時受到鼓勵和幫助，他就不會失敗了。
en: Given encouragement and help, he would not have failed.

zh: 強大的國防是和平與自由最確切的保證。
en: A strong national defense is the most certain guarantee of peace and freedom.

zh: 運動對健康有益。
en: Exercise is good for one's health.

zh: 我的腳踏車，上禮拜被偷了。
en: My bicycle was stolen last Sunday.

zh: 大多數的學生，都不曉得如何使用圖書館。
en: Most students do not know how to use a library.

zh: 我在今天的報紙上，看到一則很有趣的新聞。
en: I read an interesting piece of news in today's newspaper.

zh: 要學好英文，必須下功夫。
en: If you want to learn English well, you have to work hard.

zh: 這一篇文章值得仔細閱讀。
en: This article is worth reading carefully.

zh: 中國字很難寫嗎？
en: Is it very hard to write Chinese characters?

zh: 那一位戴黃帽子的外國人是誰？
en: Who is the foreigner that is wearing a yellow hat?

zh: 天氣一天比一天熱起來了。
en: It is getting hotter day by day.

zh: 我不是告訴過你，我到車站的時候他們已經走了嗎？
en: Haven't I told you that they had already gone when I got to the station?

zh: 今天早晨有一位穿綠色制服的人，把信件送到我們的社區來。
en: Every morning a man in a green uniform delivers mail to our community.

zh: 無論是晴天或下雨，天天都可以看到他。
en: Rain or shine, we can see him every day.

zh: 如果有掛號信要送給我們，他就會在門口按一下鈴。
en: Whenever he has registered letters for us, he will ring the doorbell.

zh: 他認識我們附近的每一個人，而我們每一個人也都認識他。
en: He knows everyone in our neighborhood, and everyone of us also knows him.

zh: 有時候我在上學的途中遇到他，他就以微笑跟我打招呼。
en: Sometimes I meet him on my way to school, and he greets me with a smile.

zh: 很多學生都不太注意讀書的方法，以至於浪費許多寶貴的時間。
en: Many students pay so little attention to reading skills that they waste a lot of precious time.

zh: 他們讀英文讀了好幾年，還是看不懂相當容易的文章。
en: They have studied English for many years, but they still cannot understand articles which are rather easy.

zh: 其實，只要方法正確，英文的閱讀能力並不難培養。
en: In fact, as long as the method is correct, English reading ability is not difficult to develop.

zh: 在老師還沒有講解課文之前，一定要自己先讀兩三遍。
en: Before your teacher explains the text to you, you must go over it two or three times.

zh: 不要讀太難的文章，也不要遇到生字就立刻查字典。
en: Don't read articles which are too difficult for you and don't look up a new word in a dictionary the moment you see it, either.

zh: 英語是一種重要的語言，所以很多人都在學習。
en: English is an important language, so many people are learning it.

zh: 許多中國學生認為學習說英語很難。
en: Many Chinese students think that it is very hard to learn to speak English.

zh: 但是只要經常練習，任何困難都可以克服。
en: But if you keep practicing speaking English, you can overcome any difficulty.

zh: 會背課本上的對話，並不表示會說英語。
en: Memorizing the dialogues in the text does not mean that you are able to speak English.

zh: 最重要的是，要能用英語說自己想說的話。
en: The most important thing is that you should be able to say whatever you want to say in English.

zh: 讀小學的時候，我身體很虛弱，並且常感冒。
en: When I was in elementary school, I was very weak and often caught colds.

zh: 自從上了國中以後，我就儘量找機會運動。
en: Ever since I entered junior high school, I have been trying hard to find opportunities for exercise.

zh: 雖然功課一直很繁重，我還是每天慢跑半小時。
en: Although my schoolwork has been heavy, I have managed to jog for half an hour every day.

zh: 六年繼續不斷的鍛鍊使我不但更加強壯，而且也長得更高。
en: Six years of constant training has made me not only stronger but also taller.

zh: 現在大家都說他們無法相信我從前又矮又瘦。
en: Now everyone says that they cannot believe that I was short and thin before.

zh: 昨天早上我出門的時候，天氣相當暖和。
en: It was quite warm when I left home yesterday morning.

zh: 所以我沒有穿毛衣，只穿了一件襯衫。
en: Therefore, I didn't wear a sweater but only a shirt.

zh: 但是到了下午，溫度卻急速下降了。
en: But the temperature dropped sharply in the afternoon.

zh: 雖然晚上比往常早回家，我還是覺得有點不舒服。
en: Though I got back home earlier than usual in the evening, I still felt slightly under the weather.

zh: 今天我不但打噴嚏而且頭痛，我想我最好馬上去看醫生。
en: Not only am I sneezing today, but I also have a headache. I think I had better see a doctor right away.

zh: 我生長在鄉下的一個小村落。
en: I grew up in a small village in the country.

zh: 那時，我家附近有一條清澈的小溪。
en: At that time, there was a clear brook near the house where I lived.

zh: 我夏天常到那裡游泳、釣魚。
en: I used to go swimming and fishing there in the summer.

zh: 現在溪水髒得連魚都不能活。
en: Now the water in the brook has become so filthy that fish cannot live in it.

zh: 我不知道甚麼時候才能再見到童年的美景。
en: I have no idea when I'll be able to see that beautiful view I remember from my childhood.

zh: 老實說，一直到昨天我才知道他已經去美國了。
en: To tell the truth, not until yesterday did I know he had gone to the United States.

zh: 首先，我要說明清楚，我並不反對你的意見。
en: To begin with, I want to make it clear that I don't disagree with your opinion.

zh: 這個月，我的運氣真是好得我都不敢相信。
en: This month I have been so lucky that I can hardly believe it. (My luck has been so good this month that I can hardly believe it.)

zh: 月初，我的數學月考考了九十分。
en: Early this month, I received a score of 90 on the monthly math exam. (Early this month, I scored 90 on the monthly math exam.)

zh: 月中，父親送我一部電腦當生日禮物。
en: In the middle of the month, Father gave me a computer as my birthday gift.

zh: 前幾天，英語演講比賽我得了第二名。
en: A few days ago, I was placed second in the English speech contest. (A few days ago, I won second place in the English speech contest.)

zh: 這輩子，我的運氣從來沒有這麼好過。
en: I have never been so lucky in my life.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 我弟弟過去經常整日虛混，一件有意義的事也不做。
en: My brother used to fool around all day long, not doing anything meaningful.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 現在，他努力用功，並且對未來有明確的計劃。
en: Now, he is studying very hard; besides, he has a clear plan for the future.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 是什麼使得他在行為和態度上有這樣明顯的改變呢？
en: What changed him so obviously in his behavior and attitude?

label: 大學聯考
zh: 是他的高中老師發現了他的潛力，並且不斷地鼓勵他。
en: It was his high school teacher that/who discovered his potential and kept encouraging him.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 弟弟說他會永遠記得並感謝這位老師。
en: My younger brother says that he will forever remember and be grateful to his teacher.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 台灣的生活最近十年變了很多。
en: Life in Taiwan has changed quite a lot over the past ten years.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 年輕的一代有許多新的生活方式。
en: The younger generation has many new ways of living.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 和他們父母親那一輩相當不同。
en: Young people are quite different from their parents.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 舉個例，很多年輕人喜歡吃美式速食，喝加糖飲料。
en: For example, many young people like to eat American fast food and consume sweet drinks.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 而老一輩的大多寧可吃中國菜，喝中國茶。
en: However, the older generation would rather eat Chinese food and drink tea.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 每次放假，我都會到台灣某個地方去旅行。
en: Whenever we have a vacation, I'll travel somewhere in Taiwan.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 今年春假，我和一些同學搭巴士到墾丁國家公園。
en: This spring vacation, I went with some of my classmates by bus to Kenting National Park.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 我們在那兒待了三天，很欣賞那裡的山林和海岸。
en: We stayed there for three days, appreciating the mountain forests and sea.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 這學期還沒結束，可是我們就在計畫夏天的旅行了。
en: This semester is not over yet, but we are planning for our summer vacation travels.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 我們大概會到台灣東部去，因為那兒風景很美。
en: We'll probably go to the east of Taiwan for the scenery there is very beautiful.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 我們即將進入二十一世紀。
en: We are going into the 21st century.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 那時，人們會活得更長久。
en: Then, people will live longer.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 那的確是個好消息。
en: That is nice indeed.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 但是會有一個問題：
en: But there exists a problem:

label: 大學聯考
zh: 更多的老人必須由更少的年輕人奉養。
en: There will be more senior citizens to be supported by fewer young people.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 以前，我常常到書店去，
en: I used to go to the bookstore,

label: 大學聯考
zh: 主要是隨便看看一些書。
en: mainly to read some books casually.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 有時會買一些小說來讀。
en: Sometimes I would buy a few novels to read.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 現在因為忙著準備考試，
en: Now as I am busy preparing for the examination,

label: 大學聯考
zh: 再也沒時間去找小說了。
en: I can spare no more time to look for some books to read.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 年輕人和老年人的睡眠習慣很不相同。
en: Young people's sleeping habit is very different from that of old people.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 許多年輕人往往很晚還不睡，第二天早上就不能早起。
en: Many young people often stay up so late that they can't get up early the next morning.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 老年人通常晚上沒事做，所以很早上床。
en: Old people usually have nothing to do, so they go to bed early.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 這兩種不同的睡眠習慣，哪一種比較有益健康呢？
en: Of these two different habits, which is better for health?

label: 大學聯考
zh: 其實，只要睡飽，早睡晚睡都沒關係。
en: In fact, as long as you get enough sleep, it doesn't matter whether you go to bed early or not.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 不關心注意是中止對話的最快速方法之一。
en: Not paying attention is one of the fastest ways to stop a conversation.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 而是真的聽懂了。
en: but you really understand.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 他如何在上學途中被狗咬了。
en: how he was bitten by a dog on his way to school.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 因為他很餓，所以考試考得不好。
en: He didn't do well in a test because he was hungry.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 聽起來你今天很倒楣。
en: Sounds like you really had a bad day. (It sounds like today wasn't your day.) (You seem to have had a really bad day.)

label: 大學聯考
zh: 昨天晚上我感覺有點不舒服。
en: I didn't feel quite well last night.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 我的媽媽要我去看中醫師。
en: My mother wanted me to go to the Chinese herbalist.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 她說中葯比西葯自然。
en: She said that Chinese medicine is more natural than Western medicine.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 我生病的時候通常都會去看西醫。
en: When I am ill, I usually go to a Western medical doctor.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 但是現在我想我有另外的選擇了。
en: But now I guess I have another choice.

label: 學測
zh: 對於什麼是最佳的渡假方式，大家都有不同的看法。
en: Everyone has different opinions about what the best way to spend a vacation is.

label: 學測
zh: 有些人喜歡到寧靜的森林中去，在那兒他們可以暫時遠離人群。
en: Some people like to go to peaceful forests, where they can get away from the crowds temporarily.

label: 學測
zh: 有些人卻寧願到大都市去，因為他們可以參觀博物館或購物。
en: Others, however, prefer to go to big cities because they can visit museums or go shopping.

label: 學測
zh: 還有一些人喜歡到海邊去，讓海浪沖走他們的煩惱。
en: Still others like to go to the beach to let the waves wash away their troubles.

label: 學測
zh: 有少數人則決定留在家裡，做一些像打掃屋子之類的事。
en: A few people, on the other hand, decide to stay at home and do things like cleaning the house.

label: 學測
zh: 昨天在回家的路上，我看到一個小女孩在路邊哭泣。
en: On my way home yesterday, I saw a little girl crying by the roadside.

label: 學測
zh: 我趕緊跑過去，問她到底發生了什麼事。
en: I hurried over to her and asked her what on earth had happened.

label: 學測
zh: 小女孩說她按了好幾次門鈴，卻沒有人來開門。
en: The little girl said that she had rung the doorbell several times, but nobody came to open the door.

label: 學測
zh: 看到她哭得那麼傷心，我就陪她等媽媽回來。
en: Seeing her crying so bitterly, I stayed with her and waited for her mother to come back.

label: 學測
zh: 雖然晚了半個鐘頭才回到家，我覺得我做了一件有意義的事。
en: Although I got home half an hour late, I felt that I had done something meaningful.

label: 學測
zh: 有沒有想過未來的旅館會是什麼樣子?
en: Have you ever wondered what the hotels of the future will look like?

label: 學測
zh: 每個房間附有一部收音機，一台電視機和一個鬧鐘。
en: Each room comes with a radio, a television, and an alarm clock.

label: 學測
zh: 此外，所有房間都有空調。
en: In addition, all the rooms are air-conditioned.

label: 學測
zh: 廁所及洗衣設施位於旅館的共同區域。
en: The restrooms and laundry facilities are located in the common areas of the hotel.

label: 學測
zh: 信不信由你，這家旅館幾乎經常是客滿
en: Believe it or not, this hotel is almost always fully booked,

label: 學測
zh: 都會地區的高房價對社會產生了嚴重的影響。
en: High housing prices in urban areas have had a serious impact on society.

label: 學測
zh: 政府正推出新的政策，以滿足人們的住房需求。
en: The government is introducing new policies to meet people's housing needs.

label: 指考
zh: 對現今的許多學生而言，在課業與課外活動間取得平衡是一大挑戰。
en: For many students today, balancing academics and extracurricular activities/striking a balance between academic and extracurricular activities is a major challenge.

label: 指考
zh: 有效的時間管理是每位有責任感的學生必須學習的首要課題。
en: Effective time management is the primary skill that every responsible student must learn.

label: 學測
zh: 相較於他們父母的世代，現今年輕人享受較多的自由和繁榮。
en: Compared to their parents' generation, young people today enjoy more freedom and prosperity.

label: 學測
zh: 但是在這個快速改變的世界中，他們必須學習如何有效地因應新的挑戰。
en: However, in this rapidly changing world, they must learn how to effectively cope with new challenges.

label: 指考
zh: 蚊子一旦叮咬過某些傳染病的患者，就可能將病毒傳給其他人。
en: Once mosquitoes bite patients with certain infectious diseases, they can potentially transmit the virus to others.

label: 指考
zh: 它們在人類中快速散播疾病，造成的死亡遠超乎我們所能想像。
en: They spread diseases rapidly among humans, causing more deaths than we can imagine.

label: 學測
zh: 近年來，有越來越多超級颱風，通常造成嚴重災害。
en: In recent years, there have been an increasing number of super typhoons, which usually cause severe damage.

label: 學測
zh: 颱風來襲時，我們應準備足夠的食物，並待在室內，若有必要，應迅速移動至安全的地方。
en: When a typhoon strikes, we should prepare enough food, stay indoors, and if necessary, quickly move to a safe place.

label: 指考
zh: 快速時尚以速度與低價為特色，讓人們可以用負擔得起的價格買到流行的服飾。
en: Fast fashion is characterized by speed and low prices, allowing people to buy trendy clothes at affordable prices.

label: 指考
zh: 然而，它所鼓勵的「快速消費」卻製造了大量的廢棄物，造成巨大的污染問題。
en: However, the "rapid consumption" it encourages creates a large amount of waste, causing significant pollution problems.

label: 學測
zh: 自2007年營運以來，高鐵（the High Speed Rail）已成為臺灣最便利、最快速的交通工具之一。
en: Since its operation in 2007, the High Speed Rail has become one of the most convenient and fastest means of transportation in Taiwan.

label: 學測
zh: 對於強調職場效率的人而言，高鐵當然是商務旅行的首選。
en: For those who emphasize workplace efficiency, the High Speed Rail is certainly the first choice for business travel.

label: 指考
zh: 創意布條最近在夜市成了有效的廣告工具，也刺激了買氣的成長。
en: Creative banners have recently become effective advertising tools in night markets, stimulating growth in sales.

label: 指考
zh: 其中有些看似無意義，但卻相當引人注目，且常能帶給人們會心的一笑。
en: Some of these seem meaningless, but they are quite eye-catching and often bring a knowing smile to people's faces.

label: 學測
zh: 我們有時會違背自己的意願去做某些事情，就只為了要取悅朋友。
en: We sometimes do things against our will just to please our friends.

label: 學測
zh: 其實，在面對同儕壓力的時候，我們應該學習堅持自己的原則。
en: In fact, when facing peer pressure, we should learn to stick to our principles.

label: 指考
zh: 早期的博物館只開放給中上階層，而且參觀者必須事先申請進入許可。
en: Early museums were only open to the upper and middle classes, and visitors had to apply for entry permits in advance.

label: 指考
zh: 現今多數人可以親自或透過線上導覽，享受探索文化珍寶的樂趣。
en: Nowadays, most people can enjoy exploring cultural treasures either in person or through online guided tours.

label: 指考補考
zh: 學習不再侷限於學校內的正規教育，非正式學習已開始扮演重要的角色。
en: Learning is no longer confined to formal education in schools; informal learning has begun to play an important role.

label: 指考補考
zh: 例如，志工服務讓學生學到如何與不同背景及不同年齡層的人互動。
en: For example, volunteer service allows students to learn how to interact with people from different backgrounds and age groups.

label: 學測
zh: 根據新聞報導，每年全球有超過百萬人在道路事故中喪失性命。
en: According to news reports, over a million people lose their lives in road accidents globally each year.

label: 學測
zh: 因此，交通法規必須嚴格執行，以確保所有用路人的安全。
en: Therefore, traffic regulations must be strictly enforced to ensure the safety of all road users.

label: 指考
zh: 很多人好奇今年年初在美國破紀錄的低溫是否與全球暖化有關。
en: Many people are curious about whether the record-breaking low temperatures in the United States at the beginning of this year are related to global warming.

label: 指考
zh: 不論答案為何，氣候專家預告這種不正常的天氣將會變成新的常態。
en: Regardless of the answer, climate experts predict that this kind of abnormal weather will become the new normal.

label: 試辦考試
zh: 很多人害怕公開演講，常在上台之前發抖、覺得頭昏。
en: Many people are afraid of/are scared of/are fearful of public speaking, often trembling/shivering and feeling dizzy before going/getting on stage.

label: 試辦考試
zh: 只要我們對自己有信心，並持續練習，就可以克服怯場的問題。
en: As long as we have confidence/faith/we are confident in ourselves and keep (on)/continue practicing, we can overcome/conquer/beat the problem of stage fright.

label: 新型學測
zh: 飼養寵物並非一項短暫的人生體驗，而是一個對動物的終生承諾。
en: Keeping/Raising a pet/pets is not a short-term/temporary life experience, but a lifelong commitment/promise to an animal/animals.

label: 新型學測
zh: 在享受寵物所帶來的歡樂時，我們不該忽略要善盡照顧他們的責任。
en: When we enjoy/When enjoying/While enjoying the joy/fun/pleasure they/pets bring (to) us, we should not ignore/neglect/overlook the responsibility of/to taking/take good care of them.

label: 新型學測
zh: 歷史一再證明，戰爭會造成極為可怕的災難。
en: History proves/has proven/proved time and again that wars will/would cause extremely terrible/horrible disasters.

label: 新型學測
zh: 避免衝突、確保世界和平應該是所有人類追求的目標。
en: To avoid/Avoiding conflicts and ensure/ensuring world peace should be the goal pursued by all human beings.

label: 新型學測
zh: 每逢選舉季節，總會看到政治人物造訪各地著名廟宇。
en: Every/During election season, politicians can/will be seen visiting famous temples in different places/areas.

label: 新型學測
zh: 除了祈求好的選舉結果，他們也希望展現對在地文化與習俗的尊重。
en: Besides/Aside from/Apart from praying for good luck/election results, they also hope to show respect to local culture and customs.

label: 新型學測
zh: 人類的想像和創意是科技進步最大的驅動力。
en: Human's/Human/Mankind's imagination and creativity is the biggest/strongest driving force/power for technological advancement/advances/advance.

label: 新型學測
zh: 過去在科幻電影中出現的神奇物件，現在正逐一成真。
en: Amazing/Fantastic things/objects that appeared in science-fiction/sci-fi movies in the past are now becoming reality/real one by one.

label: 新型學測
zh: 現在越來越多高中英文老師已經增加在課堂上使用英文的百分比。
en: {Now/Nowadays,} more and more senior high school English teachers have increased the percentage of {English use/using English} in class.

label: 新型學測
zh: 他們將學生依英語能力分成不同組別，進行多樣的聽、說活動。
en: They divide students into different groups based on their English {ability/proficiency} and conduct {various/diverse/a variety of} listening and speaking activities.
